# MuleSoft FTPS Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (2.1) of FTPS Connector documentation.
> See [FTPS Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/ftps-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the FTPS Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Configuring a Proxy for FTPS Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/ftps-connector/latest/ftps-connector-proxy.md)
- [Upgrading and Migrating FTPS Connector to Version 2.1](https://docs.mulesoft.com/ftps-connector/latest/ftps-connector-upgrade-guide.md)
- [FTPS Connector 2.1 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/ftps-connector/latest/ftps-documentation.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure FTPS Connector 2.1](https://docs.mulesoft.com/ftps-connector/latest/ftps-studio-configuration.md)
- [Troubleshoot FTPS Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/ftps-connector/latest/ftps-troubleshooting.md)
- [FTPS Connector XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/ftps-connector/latest/ftps-xml-maven.md)
- [FTPS Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/ftps-connector/latest/index.md)
